'''bachïfshïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oke|oke]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oke|oke]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| bachïfshïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || bæchïfshïfth || bæchïfshïfj || bæchïfshïfsh || bæchïfshïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || bachïfchïfshïfth || bachïfchïfshïfj || bachïfchïfshïfsh || bachïfchïfshïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || bachïfshïfth || bachïfshïfj || bachïfshïfsh || bachïfshïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || bachïffshïffth || bachïffshïffj || bachïffshïffsh || bachïffshïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || bachïfshïfïf || bachïfshïfïf || bachïfshïfïf || bachïfshïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || bachïfshïfth || bachïfshïfj || bachïfshïfsh || bachïfshïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || bachïfshïfïfl || bachïfshïfïfl || bachïfshïfïfl || bachïfshïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || bachïfshïfïfïf || bachïfshïfïfïf || bachïfshïfïfïf || bachïfshïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || bachïfshïfïfn || bachïfshïfïfn || bachïfshïfïfn || bachïfshïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || bachïfshïfïforo || bachïfshïfïforo || bachïfshïfïforo || bachïfshïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
